message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.isnull + notnull (4 cases)

Append 4 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.isnull and
Series.notnull (legacy pandas aliases of isna/notna):

- isnull_basic (mixed nulls)
- isnull_no_nulls (returns all-False mask)
- notnull_basic
- notnull_all_nulls (returns all-False mask)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
boolean Series, runs the Rust implementation, and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. SeriesIsNull and SeriesNotNull were already
wired in FixtureOperation; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-o4ose]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
